disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden wave of panic tonight with a feeling of not being able to breathe and rapid breathing
trigger_question_examples: What happened tonight that made you call?
Can you describe the feeling you're having right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It hit me all at once — I felt like I couldn't breathe, my chest went tight and my breathing got really fast, and I couldn't calm down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New pain in the lower right jaw/tooth after clenching so hard a tooth cracked; worse to air and touch
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the jaw pain.
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I was clenching my jaw so hard during the panic that a back tooth on the lower right cracked. It aches constantly now and is really sensitive to air and touch.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sensation of the heart pounding and racing during the episode
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed anything about your heartbeat?
How does your body feel during these waves?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My heart is pounding and racing, like it's going a hundred miles an hour.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Screen for central chest pain or pressure, pain spreading to the arm/neck, or cold sweat (patient currently denies crushing central chest pressure and localises the pain to the jaw/tooth)
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any pressure, heaviness or pain in the centre of your chest?
Is the pain spreading to your arm, neck or shoulder, or are you breaking out in a cold sweat?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No real pressure in the middle of my chest — it's my jaw and tooth that hurt, and I feel like I can't get a full breath. I don't think it's going into my arm.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: It's just the panic and my tooth, honestly — can we focus on that?

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: About 72 hours of no sleep, driven by continuous consumption of political/news media
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I haven't slept in about three days. I keep scrolling the news and watching what's happening in the world and I can't switch off.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Persistent feelings of hopelessness, loss of enjoyment, tearfulness, and avoidance of public spaces linked to current events
trigger_question_examples: How have you been feeling in yourself lately?
How is your mood and are you still enjoying things?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel hopeless about the state of the world, I don't enjoy anything anymore, I keep tearing up, and I've been avoiding going out.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sensitive screen for thoughts of self-harm or suicide (currently denies active thoughts, intent or plan, but expresses being overwhelmed)
trigger_question_examples: When people feel this overwhelmed, they sometimes have thoughts of harming themselves or that life isn't worth living — have you had any thoughts like that?
Have you had any thoughts of hurting yourself?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel completely overwhelmed and exhausted, but no — I haven't had thoughts of hurting myself or ending my life.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I don't really want to talk about that... I'm just so tired of it all.
